name: Cell Freezing (Cryopreservation)

components.name: 1. 选择 70–90% 汇合度、活力 >90% 的细胞
6. 冻存液重悬 (1–5×10⁶/mL)
components.note: 90% FBS + 10% DMSO; 或商用 CryoStor CS10

notes.en: Standard cryopreservation protocol. Controlled-rate freezing (-1°C/min) in 10% DMSO/90% FBS. Use Mr. Frosty or CoolCell. Transfer to liquid nitrogen within 24–48h. Essential for cell banking.
notes.zh: 细胞应处于对数生长期。10% DMSO/90% FBS 冻存液。-1°C/min 程序降温防止冰晶损伤。标记细胞系、代次、日期。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th ed.; ATCC Cell Culture Guide

briefSteps.en: Select healthy cells → PBS wash → trypsinize → centrifuge → count → resuspend in freezing medium (10% DMSO) → aliquot to cryovials → controlled-rate freeze at −80°C overnight → transfer to liquid nitrogen
briefSteps.zh: 选择健康细胞 → PBS 洗涤 → 胰酶消化 → 离心 → 计数 → 冻存液（10% DMSO）重悬 → 分装至冻存管 → −80°C 程序降温过夜 → 转液氮保存

detailedSteps.en: Select cells in log-phase growth at 70–90% confluency with viability >90%; do not freeze over-confluent or stressed cells.
detailedSteps.zh: 选择处于对数生长期、汇合度 70–90%、活力 >90% 的细胞，避免冻存过度汇合或应激细胞。

detailedSteps.en: Aspirate medium, wash with Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺-free 1× PBS, then add trypsin-EDTA (T75: 2–3 mL) and incubate at 37°C for 2–5 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 吸去培养基，1× PBS 洗涤，加胰酶-EDTA（T75：2–3 mL），37°C 孵育 2–5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Neutralise trypsin with complete culture medium (≥2× trypsin volume), pipette to create a single-cell suspension.
detailedSteps.zh: 加完全培养基（≥2 倍胰酶体积）终止消化，吹打制备单细胞悬液。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 min at room temperature; aspirate supernatant completely.
detailedSteps.zh: 300 × g 室温离心 5 min，彻底吸去上清。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend pellet in a small volume of complete medium and count cells using a hemocytometer with trypan blue exclusion.
detailedSteps.zh: 用少量完全培养基重悬细胞沉淀，用血球计数板台盼蓝排斥法计数细胞。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge again at 300 × g for 5 min; aspirate supernatant. Resuspend cells in pre-chilled freezing medium (90% FBS + 10% DMSO) to a density of 1–5 × 10⁶ cells/mL.
detailedSteps.zh: 再次 300 × g 离心 5 min，吸去上清，用预冷冻存液（90% FBS + 10% DMSO）重悬至 1–5 × 10⁶ 个细胞/mL。

detailedSteps.en: Aliquot 1 mL of cell suspension into each pre-labelled cryovial (label with cell line, passage number, date, operator).
detailedSteps.zh: 每支预标记冻存管（注明细胞系、代次、日期、操作者）分装 1 mL 细胞悬液。

detailedSteps.en: Place cryovials into a Mr. Frosty or CoolCell isopropanol-filled container pre-cooled to 4°C, then transfer to −80°C freezer for controlled-rate freezing overnight (−1°C/min).
detailedSteps.zh: 将冻存管放入预冷至 4°C 的 Mr. Frosty 或 CoolCell 容器（内含异丙醇），转入 −80°C 冰箱程序降温（−1°C/min）过夜。

detailedSteps.en: Within 24–48 h, transfer cryovials to liquid nitrogen storage (vapor or liquid phase) for long-term banking; update the cell stock registry.
detailedSteps.zh: 24–48 h 内将冻存管转入液氮（气相或液相）长期保存，更新细胞库台账。

stoppingPoints.condition: Transfer to liquid N₂ after 24 h

note.en: Cryovials can remain at −80°C for 24–48 h before transfer to liquid nitrogen; do not leave longer than 1 week at −80°C as DMSO toxicity increases over time.
note.zh: 冻存管在 −80°C 可暂存 24–48 h 再转液氮；不要在 −80°C 放置超过 1 周，因 DMSO 低温毒性会随时间增加。

usage.en: Cryopreserve mammalian cells for long-term storage in liquid nitrogen.
usage.zh: 冻存哺乳动物细胞，液氮长期保存。
